_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: the XBP1s-mediated transcriptional activities for MPV17L2, POLG, TFAM, PINK1, and Parkin notably decreased in S462TY, STS26T, and T265 cells after FT895 treatment
details: XBP1s-mediated transcriptional activities for MPV17L2, POLG, TFAM, PINK1, and Parkin notably decreased after FT895 treatment
